botcomponent.description: Delegate to the Inventory & Fulfillment Agent for anything about stock and consoles - whether a SKU is in stock locally, restock/ETA dates, in-stock alternatives or upgrades, which BlastBox Omega model a game requires, and the MEGA-only exclusive titles used to upsell a customer choosing between the base console and the MEGA Edition.
botcomponent.name: Inventory & Fullfilment Agent
